word: G4872 - συναναβαίνω - synanabaínō - soon-an-ab-ah'-ee-no - Come up with

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Come up with
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to ascend at the same time, come up together with to a higher place
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4862 and G305; to ascend in company with: - come up with.
